testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Product Crocin Tablet not found in cart expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Product Crocin Tablet not found in cart expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.apollo247.testing.stepdefinitions.BuyMedicineSteps.product_should_be_visible_in_cart(BuyMedicineSteps.java:80) at ✽.Product "Crocin Tablet" should be visible in cart(file:///C:/Users/roshi/git/Testing-Sprint-Apollo2471/src/test/java/com/apollo247/testing/features/BuyMedicineFeature.feature:18)
